about.label: About
about.hint: Version info, source code, and support links.

feeds.manageNoResults: No feeds match the current filters.
feeds.updatesEmpty: No feed videos match the current folder filter.
feeds.emptyBodyNoChannels: Updates from starred YouTube channels will show up here.
feeds.emptyBodyFiltered: There are no recent videos here right now. Check back later or switch to All.
feeds.fetchToastNotFound: Could not refresh this channel. Feed returned 404.
feeds.emptyBodyWaiting: Your saved channels are ready. Keep the app open for a bit or reopen later, and recent uploads will appear here.
feeds.removeMessage: This removes the channel from Library and clears its feed videos.

settings.label: Settings
settings.hubHint: Playback, sync, imports, and webview tools in one place.
settings.generalHint: Playback defaults, appearance, tools, and data transfer.
settings.appearanceHint: Control how YouTube looks inside the app.
settings.toolsHint: Open URLs and manage the webview environment.
settings.transferHint: Bring bookmarks in or take them with you.

theme.label: YouTube Theme
theme.hint: Restart manually if change not reflected in webview.

login.label: Try this if couldn't login from webview

settings.injectCookie: Inject cookie if couldn't login from webview
settings.injectCookieTitle: Inject auth cookie into the webview
settings.injectCookieHint: Copy the Cookie header value from your PC browser. This is a workaround when you couldn't login with email/password.

sync.label: Sync
sync.hint: Sync bookmarks across your phones and computers as a premium user.
